auth.error.accountInactive: Your account is not yet activated. Check your email or request a new activation link.
auth.error.accountBlocked: Your account has been blocked due to too many failed attempts. Please contact an administrator.
auth.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

activate.title: Activate your account
activate.description: Click the button below to activate your account.
activate.success.title: Account activated!
activate.success.description: Your account is now active. You can sign in.
activate.error.invalid: The activation link is invalid or expired.
activate.resend.label: Resend activation email
activate.resend.success: Email sent if your account exists and is not yet activated.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.success.title: Password changed!
resetPassword.success.description: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.error.invalid: The reset link is invalid or expired.
resetPassword.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Welcome!
onboarding.description: Choose how you want to participate. You can select multiple options.
onboarding.referee.title: I am a referee
onboarding.referee.description: Register as a referee to be assigned to matches.
onboarding.joinTeam.title: Join a team
onboarding.joinTeam.description: Submit a membership request to an existing team.
onboarding.joinTeam.team.label: Team
onboarding.joinTeam.role.label: Requested role
onboarding.createTeam.title: Create a team
onboarding.createTeam.description: Create a new team and automatically become its coach.
onboarding.createTeam.field.name: Team name
onboarding.createTeam.done: Team created — you are now the coach.
onboarding.skip.hint: These actions remain available from your profile.

joinRequest.error.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this team.
joinRequest.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

register.field.team.hint: You can join a team later from your profile. Team membership requires coach or admin approval.
register.success: Account created! Check your email to activate your account.
register.error.emailInUse: This email address is already registered.
register.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
